commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Codex app-server unresolved native tool-result tracking, waits up to 250 ms before final result construction, and adds projector/run-attempt regressions for delayed and missing terminal native results.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +195. Total +231 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main drains only already-queued notifications before `buildResult()`, while Codex sends authoritative native item results through separate `item/completed` notifications and empty/not-loaded turn item payloads. I did not run a live embedded Codex race reproduction.
